race.comment: HEART BALM (7) was rewarded for her consistency second-up when ploughing through the heavy going for a comprehensive Maiden win over 1400m at this track. Winning apprentice retains the ride and can keep the momentum going. TALUK (11) returned solid closing figures with a gritty third from a wide barrier over 1200m at this track. Suitably placed from an inside gate and has solid each-way prospects. A BOOK OF DAYS (1) tough gelding due for a change of luck. Shouldered the 60.5kg with a tenacious on-pace fourth over 1400m at Nowra on a heavy (8) surface. Will be there at the business end again with the claim. BOY FROM TENNESSEE (13) has been solid in two runs following a spell. Most recently finished 3.5 lengths away in fifth three-and-a-half weeks ago over 1400m at Narrandera. Ready to peak and could add some value.
